channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th June
item.description:
283ay with Standard tm please cut tall grass obstructing footway approx 25m (Embankment & Cuttings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Hedgeovergrown so cannot see oncoming traffic, 8th June
item.description:
The stile/exit onto A435 crossing East - you cannot see cars coming around the corner until it is too late. I have nearly been hit crossing as I have had to run at the last minute. Visibility is poor looking both north and south (better looking south however). It is not the grass verge, but overhanging branches that are the issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooded drain, 8th June
item.description:
Please see photo. On Alstone Lane, opposite 1 Alstone Court.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several more holes near junction with Blake Croft, 8th June
item.description:
Several more unmarked potholes on Springbank Way, near junction with Blake Croft.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Springbank Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th June
item.description:

item.title: Large London plane tree overhanging branches has caused considerable damage by blocking the gutters with leaves, seeds and twigs, has cost a lot of money to repair., 8th June
item.description:
10 Pittville Lawn, on road in front of 10 Pittville Lawn,
